title: CoAP Authorization Framework for Mutating LCI Resources
description: Implement explicit authorization policies for all mutating CoAP resources (/config PUT, /msg/inbox POST, sub-resources in coap_config.c/coap_msg.c, deaddrop, keys) using local-admin (is_local_admin), transport (SLIP/BLE LCI scope check), and OSCORE (ctx lookup + unprotect) at handler dispatch boundaries. Update CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE enforcement. Add dedicated tests. Close with 3 security reviews.
